name: Library Member Overview
script: frappe.ui.form.on('Library Member', { refresh: function(frm) { render\_member\_overview(frm); } }); function render\_member\_overview(frm) { var wrapper = frm.fields\_dict['member\_overview\_html'].$wrapper; wrapper.html('  Loading member overview...  '); frappe.db.get\_single\_value('Library Settings', 'fine\_per\_day').then(function(rate) { frappe.db.get\_single\_value('Library Settings', 'issue\_duration\_days').then(function(duration) { var fine\_per\_day = rate || 5; var issue\_duration\_days = duration || 14; var today = frappe.datetime.get\_today(); frappe.db.get\_list('Book Issue', { filters: { library\_member: frm.doc.name }, fields: ['name', 'library\_book', 'book\_copy', 'issue\_date', 'due\_date', 'issue\_status', 'return\_date'], limit: 100, order\_by: 'issue\_date desc' }).then(function(issues) { frappe.db.get\_list('Book return', { filters: {}, fields: ['name', 'book\_issue', 'fine\_amount', 'days\_overdue', 'library\_book', 'return\_date', 'book\_condition'], limit: 100 }).then(function(all\_returns) { var member\_issue\_names = issues.map(function(i) { return i.name; }); var returns = all\_returns.filter(function(r) { return member\_issue\_names.includes(r.book\_issue); }); var total = issues.length; var returned\_list = issues.filter(function(i) { return i.issue\_status === 'Returned'; }); var active = issues.filter(function(i) { return i.issue\_status === 'Issued' || i.issue\_status === 'Overdue'; }); var overdue\_list = []; var live\_total\_fine = 0; active.forEach(function(i) { if (i.due\_date) { var days\_diff = frappe.datetime.get\_diff( frappe.datetime.str\_to\_obj(today), frappe.datetime.str\_to\_obj(i.due\_date) ); if (days\_diff > 0) { i.days\_late = days\_diff; i.live\_fine = days\_diff \* fine\_per\_day; live\_total\_fine += i.live\_fine; overdue\_list.push(i); } else { i.days\_remaining = Math.abs(days\_diff); } } }); var total\_paid\_fine = returns.reduce(function(s, r) { return s + (r.fine\_amount || 0); }, 0); // Active rows var active\_rows = ''; if (active.length === 0) { active\_rows = '| No books currently issued | | | | | '; } else { active.forEach(function(i) { var is\_overdue = i.days\_late > 0; var status\_bg = is\_overdue ? '#FCEBEB' : '#E6F1FB'; var status\_color = is\_overdue ? '#A32D2D' : '#185FA5'; var status\_text = is\_overdue ? 'Overdue' : 'Issued'; var fine\_cell = ''; if (is\_overdue) { fine\_cell = ', ' + i.days\_late + ' day(s) late x Rs.' + fine\_per\_day + '/day = **Rs.' + i.live\_fine + '**'; } else if (i.days\_remaining !== undefined) { fine\_cell = ', ' + i.days\_remaining + ' day(s) remaining'; } active\_rows += '|' + ' ' + (i.library\_book || '-') + ' |' + ' ' + (i.issue\_date || '-') + ' |' + ' ' + (i.due\_date || '-') + fine\_cell + ' |' + ' ' + issue\_duration\_days + ' days allowed |' + ' ' + status\_text + ' |' + ' '; }); } // Returned rows var returned\_rows = ''; if (returned\_list.length === 0) { returned\_rows = '| No books returned yet | | | | | '; } else { returned\_list.forEach(function(i) { var matched\_return = returns.find(function(r) { return r.book\_issue === i.name; }); var fine\_paid = matched\_return ? (matched\_return.fine\_amount || 0) : 0; var days\_overdue = matched\_return ? (matched\_return.days\_overdue || 0) : 0; var fine\_badge = fine\_paid > 0 ? 'Fine paid Rs.' + fine\_paid + '' : 'No fine'; returned\_rows += '|' + ' ' + (i.library\_book || '-') + ' |' + ' ' + (i.issue\_date || '-') + ' |' + ' ' + (matched\_return ? matched\_return.return\_date : '-') + ' |' + ' ' + (days\_overdue > 0 ? days\_overdue + ' day(s)' : '-') + ' |' + ' ' + fine\_badge + ' |' + ' '; }); } var fine\_bg = live\_total\_fine > 0 ? '#FCEBEB' : '#EAF3DE'; var fine\_color = live\_total\_fine > 0 ? '#A32D2D' : '#3B6D11'; var paid\_note = total\_paid\_fine > 0 ? 'Rs.' + total\_paid\_fine + ' already paid' : ''; var html = '' + '' + 'Library Settings - ' + issue\_duration\_days + ' days issue period - Rs.' + fine\_per\_day + '/day fine' + '' + 'Total Issued' + total + '' + 'Currently Held' + active.length + '' + 'Returned' + returned\_list.length + '' + 'Overdue' + overdue\_list.length + '' + 'Fine DueRs.' + live\_total\_fine + '' + paid\_note + '' + '' + '' + 'Currently Issued Books' + '  ' + '|' + ' Book |' + ' Issued On |' + ' Due Date |' + ' Allowed Days |' + ' Status |' + ' | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | ' + '' + active\_rows + '' + ' ' + '' + 'Return History' + '  ' + '|' + ' Book |' + ' Issued On |' + ' Returned On |' + ' Days Overdue |' + ' Fine |' + ' | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | ' + '' + returned\_rows + '' + ' ' + '' + 'Issue Book' + 'Return Book' + '' + ''; wrapper.html(html); }); }); }); }); }
